entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE AND VARIABILITY
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agricultural and water systems

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown for food or other economic purposes in the Pennar river basin

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Sources of water including irrigation and river flows in the Pennar river basin

entities.name: PENNAR RIVER BASIN
entities.description: A river basin located in Andhra Pradesh, Southern India

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The southern region of the Indian subcontinent

entities.name: INTEGRATED MODELLING ASSESSMENT (IMS)
entities.description: A framework developed by establishing functional links between hydrological, crop simulation, and regional climate models

entities.name: SOIL WATER ASSESSMENT TOOL (SWAT)
entities.description: A hydrological model used within the IMS to simulate water resources

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL POLICY INTEGRATED CLIMATE (EPIC)
entities.description: An agricultural crop simulation model used within the IMS

entities.name: PROVIDING REGIONAL CLIMATES FOR IMPACTS STUDIES (PRECIS)
entities.description: A regional climate model used within the IMS

entities.name: HADRM3
entities.description: A third-generation regional climate model from the Hadley Centre used as a major driver for the study

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The long-term heating of Earth's climate system used to derive climate change scenarios

entities.name: IRRIGATION WATER
entities.description: Water used for agricultural irrigation analyzed as part of water resources

entities.name: SOIL-WATER REGIME
entities.description: The state and movement of water in the soil analyzed in agro-meteorological analysis

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The biological process of plant development analyzed in agro-meteorological analysis

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERN
entities.description: The spatial and temporal arrangement of crops in the region

entities.name: MEAN ANNUAL FLOWS
entities.description: The average volume of water flowing through the river system annually

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION LOSSES
entities.description: The combined loss of water from soil evaporation and plant transpiration

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: SURFACE TEMPERATURES
entities.description: The temperature of the Earth's surface, identified as a primary cause of yield decrease

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation, identified as a factor affecting crop yields

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC CO2
entities.description: The concentration of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere affecting crop yields

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A rain-fed crop showing significant yield decrease under climate change scenarios

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A rain-fed crop showing yield decrease under climate change scenarios

entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: A rain-fed crop showing yield decrease under climate change scenarios

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: An irrigated crop showing yield decrease under climate change scenarios

entities.name: A2 SCENARIO
entities.description: A high-emission climate change scenario resulting in significant yield and flow changes

entities.name: B2 SCENARIO
entities.description: A lower-emission climate change scenario resulting in less severe yield and flow changes

relationships.target: PROVIDING REGIONAL CLIMATES FOR IMPACTS STUDIES (PRECIS)
